description: Genuine leather shoes in jet black from homme for dressy casual dos or toned down semi-formal occasions. Style with tonal accessories. This pair will last for a lifetime if well-cared for.UpperPointy toe cup with a leather upperElasticated inserts on the sides of the tongueReinforced overlay at the heelStitch detail on the toe boxLeather liningPadded footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and textured patterns for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
